data.title: AOC Challenges Musk's DOGE Agenda, Slams 'Defund The ACLU' Call By Trump's Efficiency Czar
data.description: Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.), a prominent political figure, has responded to Elon Musk’s call for defunding the American Civil Liberties Union. In a social media post on Thursday, she also attacked proposed cuts by the Musk-headed Department of Government Efficiency.

data.title: Uber Will Deliver Your Christmas Tree And In Some Cities Bring Carolers To Houses
data.description: Part gimmick, part marketing for new services, Uber is tackling the holiday season with Christmas tree delivery and carolers.

data.title: Rubrik Stock Jumps On Strong Q3 Print: Key Details
data.description: Rubrik reports third-quarter financial results after the market close on Thursday. Here's a rundown of the report.

data.title: Asana Shares Rally After Strong Q3 Results, Upbeat Guidance: Details
data.description: "The launch of AI Studio is the birth of a new category, unlocking a massive Total Addressable Market (TAM) and growth opportunity for the company," says Dustin Moskovitz, CEO of Asana.

data.title: Donald Trump's Personnel Picks: Voters Like Huckabee, Rubio Picks, Disapprove Of Kennedy, Oz, McMahon
data.description: A new Morning Consult poll shows Trump with a declining approval rating. A look at how the public approves and disapproves of potential cabinet picks.
